name: Primeval
short_description: Can you survive this unforgiving prehistoric world? Experience the life of 65+ prehistoric species. Emerge as a hatchling and survive to reach adulthood. Evolve, gain talents and traits, and eat a healthy diet to gain powerful buffs. Collect a hoard of items to customize your dinosaurs.
detailed_description:
Experience the life of 65+ prehistoric creatures from various parts of the ecosystem.  Play as the plant eating herbivores, the meat-eating carnivores, and the fish-eating piscivores.

Roam the land, seas, and skies.   Eat, grow, and survive in an unforgiving world filled with many creatures that can hunt you or be hunted.

Earn evolution points as you play by eating, killing, and completing tasks.   Use those points to customize your creature's talents, traits, and attributes and adapt to your surroundings and challenges.

Collect a hoard of items that can be used to strengthen your creatures, nests, and eggs.

Once mature, creatures can build a nest and spawn eggs that can hatch into their very own brood.  You can also empower the eggs you'll spawn with items that you store in your nest inventory.

🔹67 playable species include:

Ankylosaurus, Archelon, Brachiosaurus, Compsognathus, Dilophosaurus, Dimetrodon, Oviraptor, Parasaurolophus, Pteranodon, Sarcosuchus, Spinosaurus, Stegosaurus, Triceratops, Tryannosaurus, Velociraptor, Argentinosaurus, Baryonyx, Carnotaurus, Gallimimus, Iguanodon, Kentrosaurus, Ouranosaurus, Pachycephalosaurus, Protoceratops, Styracosaurus, Troodon, Dimorphodon, Quetzalcoatlus, Ammonite, Anomalocaris, Cameroceras, Dunkleosteus, Elasmosaurus, Helicoprion, Ophthalmosaurus, Leedsichthys, Megalodon, Tylosaurus, Onchopristis, Xenacanthus, Meganeura, Titanoboa, Trilobite, Skorpiovenator, Suchomimus, Diplocaulus, Edmontosaurus, Padillasaurus, Kryptops, Giganotosaurus, Daspletosaurus, Ceratosaurus, Allosaurus, Inostrancevia, Gorgosaurus, Albertosaurus, Thalassodromeus, Dryosaurus, Acrocanthosaurus, Therizinosaurus, and Deinonychus, Deinosuchus, Deinocheirus, and Gigantoraptor.

🔹Just like the creatures you play, this game is ever-growing and improving.

🔹Created by a single indie developer.

🔹Multiplayer with PVP and AI is planned for a future update.
